tools.description: Spawn a new agent in a separate Terminal window with auto-init. Creates tmux session inside window for send-keys access.
tools.typical_use: Commander spawns agent: spawn_synapse.sh Alpha cut-engine claude_code

tools.description: Inject a prompt into a running agent's tmux session via send-keys. Works without window focus.
tools.typical_use: Commander writes to agent: synapse_write.sh Alpha 'claim tb_xxx'

tools.description: Wake a sleeping agent by sending /inbox command to its tmux session, forcing notification read.
tools.typical_use: Commander wakes idle agent: synapse_wake.sh Alpha
